title: About NGEs female leads role of importance interesting analysis
display_title: About NGEs female leads role of importance interesting analysis
wikitext:
[]: About NGE's female leads‘ role of importance, interesting analysis             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Sun Jan 19, 2025 8:53 pm I rewatched NGE recently and found something interesting. Misato is the leading female without doubt. She got the most screentime, a lot of interaction with nearly all important characters, also got her own development well. Then that's Asuka. She got a lot of focus and development arc in certain episodes and EOE. As well as interaction with Shinji. But she was missing in the beginning, and had little role when she lost her mind. Surprisingly, Ritsuko actually had a lot of screentime and even her own episode as well. Probably not less than Asuka. But she doesn't pilot the EVAs and she had little interaction with the leading character Shiji. The only major character she got close relationship was Misato and they went their own way later. Rei actually got the fewest line and screentime among them. 2nd Rei and 3rd Rei also wasn't exactly the same. However, she got very very strong interaction with Shinji. And 2nd Rei's character growth was very beautiful. Even 3rd Rei had shown her rebellion against Gendo. So I won't say she is less important than others. Of course she could have been handled better in later episodes and EOE.

[]: Re: About NGE's female leads‘ role of importance, interesting analysis             Quote Post by gloomyAmateur » Mon Jan 20, 2025 12:16 pm Could Yui be considered a female lead? She has barely any screentime (unless you count EVA-01) but she is one of the most plot-relevant characters.

[]: Re: About NGE's female leads‘ role of importance, interesting analysis             Quote Post by IpPo2911 » Thu Jan 23, 2025 11:29 am gloomyAmateur wrote: Could Yui be considered a female lead? She has barely any screentime (unless you count EVA-01) but she is one of the most plot-relevant characters.
